response.answer:
Schedule tasks live in the project-level Schedule tool:

- Route: `/[projectId]/schedule`
- Help article: `docs/help/articles/schedule.md`

The curated help says the Schedule tool “tracks every task, milestone, and dependency on the project” and supports Grid/Table, Board/Kanban, Gantt, Timeline, and Calendar views. It also says you open it from the project sidebar after selecting a project.

Checked:
- Feature registry: `schedule` feature, documented, linked to `docs/help/articles/schedule.md`
- App sitemap: route `frontend/src/app/(main)/[projectId]/schedule/page.tsx` → `/[projectId]/schedule`

If you meant AI-created schedule tasks specifically, the app also has AI assistant actions docs, but I did not see a separate schedule-task action entry in the registry.

toolTrace.detail: App Expert produced an answer from read-only app knowledge tools.
